title: pelargonium × sphondylifolium
intro: Pelargonium × sphondylifolium, also known as Rose Geranium or Cape Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × sphondylifolium include essential oil, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
